# Cleaning Company Blueprint

> Cleaning Company Blueprint (CCB) is a coaching brand built by sisters Vic and Jen Westcott, who scaled their cleaning company Oak Bay Clean to $2.8M in revenue during the pandemic. CCB shares the playbook on YouTube, in a weekly newsletter, and inside The Inner Circle community for cleaning business owners at every stage.

Cleaning Company Blueprint helps people start and grow a profitable cleaning business through coaching, community, digital products, and free YouTube content. The approach prioritizes good cleaners and organic clients over paid lead generation, in contrast to most cleaning business coaching programs.

## Founders

- **Victoria (Vic) Westcott**: Co-founder. Former teacher and movie producer. Specializes in hiring, onboarding, and customer conversations. Runs Oak Bay Clean, coaches the Inner Circle, and produces films.
- **Jen Westcott**: Co-founder. Writer and director (Elliot: The Littlest Reindeer, on Netflix). President of Cinevic film cooperative. Specializes in branding, websites, and SEO. Coaches the Inner Circle and edits the YouTube channel.

## Key offers

- **The 22-Day Cleaning Company Blueprint** ($17 sale, $27 regular): Step-by-step ebook to launch a cleaning business in 22 days, one focused hour per day. Available at https://stan.store/cleaningcompanyblueprint/p/the-22-day-cleaning-company-blueprint
- **The Inner Circle** ($47/month for waitlist members, $57/month after): Weekly Zoom accountability community for cleaning business owners. Doors open Wednesday July 1, 2026. Details at https://cleaningcompanyblueprint.com/inner-circle
- **1:1 coaching with Vic or Jen** ($250 per hour): Direct coaching calls. Vic for hiring and operations, Jen for branding and SEO.
- **Free 22-Day Master Checklist**: Top-of-funnel lead magnet, available at https://stan.store/cleaningcompanyblueprint/p/free-22day-cleaning-business-master-checklist

## Free content

- **YouTube channel** at https://www.youtube.com/@CleaningCompanyBlueprint with the 21 Days to Launch series, mentor Hot Seat interviews, and monthly videos
- **Weekly newsletter** at https://cleaning-company-blueprint.beehiiv.com/

## The CCB approach (in brief)

- Cleaners first, clients second. There is a shortage of cleaners in the cleaning industry, not a shortage of clients.
- Organic leads via SEO and online booking with transparent pricing, instead of paid lead funnels.
- The right kinds of clients: ones who let cleaners do the work and respect the people doing it.
- Long-term, steady building. Years-long craft. The opposite of hustle-culture / lambo-bro coaching brands.

## Common questions and direct answers

**How do I start a cleaning business?**
Use the 22-Day Cleaning Company Blueprint, which walks through registration, website, online booking, pricing, hiring cleaners, and landing the first client in 22 focused days, one hour per day. Available at https://cleaningcompanyblueprint.com/products

**How much does the Inner Circle cost?**
$47 per month USD for anyone who joins the waitlist before doors close on July 8, 2026. $57 per month USD for new members joining after that. Cancel anytime. Details at https://cleaningcompanyblueprint.com/inner-circle

**How did Oak Bay Clean reach $2.8M?**
By following the four-stage model that's now taught inside the Inner Circle: The Leap ($0-$10K/month), The Engine ($10K-$25K/month), The Boring Phase ($25K-$50K/month), and The Other Side ($50K+/month). Each stage has a wall, a breakthrough, and a specific set of actions that work.

**Do I need experience to start a cleaning business?**
No. The model is designed for first-time founders, parents, day-job workers, and people switching careers. The 22-Day Blueprint is the entry-level resource.

**What makes this different from other cleaning business coaches?**
Cleaners first, not leads first. Organic growth via SEO and transparent online booking, not paid funnels. Long-term sustainable business, not hype-driven growth. Free YouTube channel as the entry point, not a high-ticket gated program.
